body:
Fixes #1658

## Summary

- Flatten parenthesized LINO option/value links such as `(--isolation screen)` into CLI argument values in LENV and LINO parsing.
- Strip and validate configured Telegram `--isolation` overrides before solve/hive yargs validation, then pass the effective backend into execution/queueing.
- Await Telegram LENV loading so configuration parse failures do not degrade into misleading downstream token errors.
- Add issue #1658 case-study data and reproduction logs under `docs/case-studies/issue-1658`.

## Reproduction

Before the fix, running `hive-telegram-bot --configuration ... --dry-run` with Telegram env vars unset and `(--isolation screen)` in both override lists failed with:

```text
Error: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN not set. Use --token or TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var.
```

After the fix, the same dry-run exits 0 and the summary preserves `--isolation` plus `screen` in both solve and hive overrides. Evidence is in:

- `docs/case-studies/issue-1658/source-data/reproduction/before-dry-run.log`
- `docs/case-studies/issue-1658/source-data/reproduction/after-dry-run.log`

## Tests

```bash
node tests/test-lenv-reader.mjs
node tests/test-lino.mjs
node tests/test-telegram-bot-configuration-isolation-links-notation.mjs
node tests/test-telegram-bot-hero-links-notation.mjs
npm run lint
npm run format:check
npm test
```

comments.body:
## Solution summary

Implemented, pushed, and marked PR 1659 ready: https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/pull/1659

What changed:
- `(--isolation screen)` now parses through LENV/LINO as `--isolation`, `screen`.
- Telegram configured overrides strip/validate `--isolation` before solve/hive yargs validation.
- Telegram config loading is now awaited to avoid misleading token errors.
- Added regression coverage and case-study artifacts under `docs/case-studies/issue-1658`.

Verification:
- `node tests/test-lenv-reader.mjs`
- `node tests/test-lino.mjs`
- `node tests/test-telegram-bot-configuration-isolation-links-notation.mjs`
- `node tests/test-telegram-bot-hero-links-notation.mjs`
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run format:check`
- `npm test`
- GitHub Actions run passed for PR 1659.

Online sources checked for the case study:
- https://www.jsdelivr.com/package/npm/links-notation
- https://docs.rs/crate/links-notation/0.13.0
